'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=42KpY7hi34dlX9LTn.t8fRxgJ0H0.G4FwEkTWP5iN88-1775916090-1.0.1.1-i1k2eYl01shY8CI5QBFyc.oIyA.DDmaGRQ.79MFc9IA"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
